robots.name: Logic Gates
robots.description: Interactive AND, OR, NOT, NAND, XOR, XNOR, NOR. Click inputs to toggle, see truth tables, watch signals propagate.

robots.name: ALU Simulator
robots.description: Arithmetic Logic Unit — click bits to set values, choose ADD/SUB/AND/OR/XOR/NOT/SHL/SHR. See binary math and CPU flags.
